Microsoft Foundry documentation (formerly Azure AI Studio)

The AI app and agent factory - build, optimize, and govern AI apps and agents at scale.

Sections:
- Create apps with code: Quickstart create Foundry resources, Chat with an agent, AI templates
- Foundry Models: Models sold directly by Azure, Deployment types, DeepSeek-R1, Fine-tuning
- Foundry Agent Service: Orchestrate and host AI agents, Azure AI app template for agents, AI Red Teaming Agent (preview)
- Foundry Control Plane: Trustworthy AI, Content Safety, Trace applications, Evaluate agentic workflows, Monitor generative AI apps
- Foundry IQ: What is Foundry IQ, FAQ, Connect knowledge base to agents
- Foundry Tools: Speech, Translator, Language, Document Intelligence, Content Understanding, Face
- Azure Machine Learning: Train models, Orchestrate pipelines, AutoML
- Foundry Local: Run LLMs on device for free, Integrate apps, Run HuggingFace models

SDKs: Python, C#, JavaScript, Java

Resources: Microsoft Foundry portal, SDKs, Labs, GitHub Models, VS Code extension

Updated: 2026-03-30
